description_long: This object consists of three black hard-shell briefcases, stacked on top of each other, with a fourth briefcase standing upright behind the stack. The briefcases are rectangular with rounded edges and feature molded plastic exteriors, each with a visible red latch and a central handle. Scattered around the base of the stack are numerous metallic bullets, suggesting the briefcases may be used for transporting firearms or ammunition. The surface of the briefcases is smooth with subtle paneling and reinforced seams, giving them a rugged, utilitarian appearance. The handles are integrated into the top edge of each case, and the latches are positioned near the handles for secure closure. No external pockets or additional compartments are visible, and the cases appear to be designed for durability and secure transport.
description: A set of three stacked black hard-shell briefcases with red latches and molded handles, surrounded by scattered bullets. The cases have a rugged, utilitarian look with smooth surfaces and reinforced seams.
description_view_0: Three briefcases are stacked with a fourth standing behind, showing the front faces, handles, and red latches, with bullets scattered around the base.
description_view_1: The briefcases are viewed from the side, highlighting their thickness, the stacked arrangement, and the upright case in the background, with bullets more visible on the left.
description_view_2: The rear and side panels of the briefcases are visible, showing the smooth, unadorned surfaces and the layered stack, with fewer bullets in view.
description_view_3: A side angle reveals the profile of the briefcases, emphasizing the handles and latches, and the scattered bullets concentrated near the front.
attribute_handle_type: Single molded plastic handle on each briefcase, rectangular in shape, fixed and integrated into the top edge.
attribute_lock_mechanism: Visible red latch closure mechanism on each briefcase, located adjacent to the handle; no key or combination lock visible.
